'''âj-p-z-z''' ('''kajapzezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:loave|loave]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-p-z-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loave|loave]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-p-z-z
|-
! Lemma
| kajapzezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijapzezoko|thijapzezoko]] || [[word:jijapzezoko|jijapzezoko]] || [[word:shijapzezoko|shijapzezoko]] || [[word:kijapzezoko|kijapzezoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujapzezoko|thuthujapzezoko]] || [[word:jujujapzezoko|jujujapzezoko]] || [[word:shushujapzezoko|shushujapzezoko]] || [[word:kukujapzezoko|kukujapzezoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojapzezoko|thojapzezoko]] || [[word:jojapzezoko|jojapzezoko]] || [[word:shojapzezoko|shojapzezoko]] || [[word:kojapzezoko|kojapzezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjapzezoko|thĂŠjapzezoko]] || [[word:jĂŠjapzezoko|jĂŠjapzezoko]] || [[word:shĂŠjapzezoko|shĂŠjapzezoko]] || [[word:kĂŠjapzezoko|kĂŠjapzezoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajapzezoko|thajapzezoko]] || [[word:jajapzezoko|jajapzezoko]] || [[word:shajapzezoko|shajapzezoko]] || [[word:kajapzezoko|kajapzezoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajapzezoko|thajapzezoko]] || [[word:jajapzezoko|jajapzezoko]] || [[word:shajapzezoko|shajapzezoko]] || [[word:kajapzezoko|kajapzezoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
